title: Post-Cutover Current-Truth Authority Normalization
objective: Correct the remaining repo-owned current-truth authority surfaces that still described the retired parent-root publication boundary as live after standalone cutover, without reopening historical packet archives or reactivating parent-root publication flow.
dependency_note: Packet 099 closed the post-cutover proof gap. The next adjacent defect was no longer validation. It was repo-owned current-truth authority drift: the overview and active Olares authority surfaces still carried parent-root publication-boundary language that was false after cutover.
execution_scope: Update only repo-owned current-truth overview and authority docs that still present `C:/APEX Platform` as the live publication boundary.
Refresh status routing so this normalization slice is recorded in the repo-visible packet trail.
Leave historical packet, handoff, and pre-cutover evidence surfaces untouched unless a later packet explicitly reclassifies them.
success_criteria: The repo overview and active Olares authority docs state the standalone repo root as the live publication boundary for active Apex Ops repo work.
The touched current-truth files no longer claim that `C:/APEX Platform` remains the live repo publication boundary.
Status routing records the slice and points the next lane at remaining parent-root mirror or historical-demotion residue rather than repeating the same authority correction.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path PROJECT_OVERVIEW.md,docs/authority/OLARES-WORKSPACE-AUTHORITY-FRAMEWORK.md,docs/authority/OLARES-BUILD-GUIDE.md -Pattern 'C:/APEX Platform remains the publication boundary','current transitional publication boundary','remains the canonical publication boundary'

validation_results.repo_overview: normalized to the live standalone repo boundary and refreshed with a current operating-note timestamp
validation_results.olares_workspace_authority_framework: normalized to treat the standalone repo root as canonical and the parent root as umbrella residue
validation_results.olares_build_guide: normalized to treat the standalone repo root and host mirror as the current operator context
validation_results.retired_boundary_claim_check: no remaining matches in the touched current-truth files for the retired live-boundary wording

next_action: Return repo-foundation routing to the remaining parent-root mirror alignment and historical-demotion residue now that the repo-owned current-truth authority chain no longer normalizes the retired parent-root publication boundary.
